Today's build note on Build in public:

The useful part of AI coding is not generating code fast. It is knowing which stage needs review before publishing.

- Fast scaffolding still needs cleanup.
- Build/deploy bugs need clearer prompts.
- SEO and language integrity should be checked before a page goes live.

Workflow checklist: https://review.mssmileenglish.com/free-ai-coding-workflow-checklist/
#AICoding #BuildInPublic

- Dựng nhanh vẫn cần review.
- Lỗi build/deploy thường cần prompt rõ hơn.
- SEO và language integrity nên được kiểm tra trước khi publish.
